data.title: MILESEEY Golf introduces GeneSonic Pro, the first golf speaker with detachable GPS handheld, at PGA Show 2026. Expanding beyond rangefinders.
data.description: MILESEEY Golf has broken new ground with the launch of the GeneSonic Pro, transitioning from rangefinders to advanced golf technology. The groundbreaking World's First Golf Speaker was officially introduced on January 21, 2026, in CITY OF INDUSTRY, Calif. This move showcases the company's commitment to innovation and expansion in the golf market.

data.title: Kasada introduces AI Agent Trust for secure agentic commerce, enhancing online security. #AI #Commerce #Kasada
data.description: Kasada has unveiled the AI Agent Trust, a new initiative aimed at bolstering secure agentic commerce. The program, designed to enhance trust in AI agents, will provide a comprehensive framework for ensuring secure transactions in the digital realm. This development comes as part of Kasada's ongoing efforts to address cybersecurity concerns, with a particular focus on safeguarding commercial interactions.

data.title: Investigation launched into Corcept Therapeutics (CORT) after 50% share price drop due to FDA CRL. Investors urged to contact firm.
data.description: On December 31, 2025, shareholders of Corcept Therapeutics Incorporated (NASDAQ: CORT) experienced a sharp decline of 50% in the stock price following the company's disclosure of receiving a complete response letter ("CRL") from the FDA regarding its proposed treatment. This news came after the company's attempt to introduce a new treatment for a certain medical condition.

data.title: AGI likely in coming years, warns Anthropic CEO. Expect job losses due to AI advances posing risks to industries.
data.description: According to top industry leaders, progress towards achieving human-level artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly increasing, posing potential risks of job displacement and disruption to various institutions. This development underscores the need for proactive measures to address the implications of AI advancement.

data.title: Safeguard Acquisition Corp. to start trading Class A shares and warrants separately from Jan 26, 2026 post IPO of 23M units. Symbols: SAC, SAC WS. Contact transfer agent to split units.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Safeguard Acquisition Corp. disclosed that holders of the 23,000,000 units from its initial public offering, which closed on December 5, 2025, can opt to separately trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants from January 26, 2026. The offering included 3,000,000 units due to underwriters exercising their overallotment option. If units remain undivided, they will still be traded on the NYSE under "SAC.U," while the Class A shares and warrants will trade under "SAC" and "SAC WS," respectively. Upon separation, only whole warrants will be traded, with no fractional warrants issued. To split the units, holders must have their brokers contact the Company’s transfer agent, Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company.

data.title: Justices express concern as Supreme Court discusses Trump's power to fire Federal Reserve official, amid ongoing pressure on central bank.
data.description: The potential ramifications of President Trump's ability to dismiss a Federal Reserve official were under consideration by the justices. Simultaneously, the president resumed his efforts to influence the central bank through a renewed pressure campaign.

data.title: Lundin Mining announces 2025 production results - 331,232t of copper, 141,859oz of gold. 2026 copper production forecasted at 310,000-335,000t.
data.description: Lundin Mining Corporation announced its production results for the year 2025, exceeding original copper production guidance and being within the revised guidance for copper, gold, and nickel. The company achieved 331,232 tonnes of copper, 141,859 ounces of gold, and 9,907 tonnes of nickel in 2025. In Q4 2025, Caserones produced 39,612 tonnes of copper, the best monthly performance since Lundin Mining acquired the mine. The company also released production guidance for 2026-2028, forecasting 310,000-335,000 tonnes of copper and 134,000-149,000 ounces of gold for 2026. In 2027, copper production is expected to increase, resulting in cumulative copper production growth over 2026-2027. Lundin Mining's three Latin American operations have shown strong performance, with production optimization plans to further increase copper output in the upcoming years. Brownfield growth initiatives and the Vicuña project are progressing well, positioning the company for continued success. Lundin Mining remains committed to operational excellence and financial consistency.

data.title: Winmark (NASD: WINA) to replace Guess? Inc. (NYSE: GES) in S&P SmallCap 600 on Jan. 26 opening, due to acquisition deal.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Winmark Corp. (NASD: WINA) is set to take the place of Guess? Inc. (NYSE: GES) in the S&P SmallCap 600 starting Monday, January 26. The acquisition deal of Guess? by Authentic Brands Group LLC and the Rolling Stockholders is anticipated to occur.

data.title: Saul Centers, Inc. revealed tax treatment of 2025 dividends for its Common Stock, with four quarterly dividends totaling.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Saul Centers, Inc. (NYSE: BFS), a real estate investment trust based in Bethesda, Maryland, disclosed the tax treatment of its dividends for the year 2025. Throughout 2025, the company distributed four quarterly dividends for its Common Stock, the total amount of which was not specified in the article.

data.title: $280 million project in CA to bring additional water sources to drought-hit communities, reversing flows during droughts.
data.description: Officials in Los Angeles and Ventura counties marked the commencement of a significant project in Culver City, California. The $280 million Sepulveda Feeder Pump Stations Project aims to bolster water sources for Southern California areas severely affected by the recent drought. This initiative by Metropolitan will enable the reversal of flows within the system during extreme drought conditions, transferring water from the Colorado River and Diamond Valley Lake to communities in need.

data.title: GBank appoints Jason Amos as EVP & CTO to lead technology strategy and modernization efforts.
data.description: In January 21, 2026, GBank Financial Holdings Inc., the parent company of GBank, made a significant announcement regarding the appointment of Jason Amos as the Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer of the Bank. Amos will be taking on the role to oversee the bank's technology strategy and efforts for modernization as they transition towards a digital-first operational approach. This move is a strategic step by GBank as they aim to adapt to the rapidly changing digital landscape.

data.title: Clearfield, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLFD) to report Q1 2026 earnings on Feb 4, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 5pm EST.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Clearfield, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLFD), a top player in community broadband fiber connectivity, revealed plans to unveil its first-quarter fiscal 2026 results, which concluded on December 31, 2025, on Wednesday, February 4, 2026, post-market closure. The company is set to conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time (4:00 p.m. Central time) on the same day to delve into its financial performance with investors.
